title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · Incident Case: Net Wifi Standards Bands
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net wifi standards bands increment in a secure wireless survey and deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare relevant 802.11 capabilities across 2.4, 5, and 6 GHz bands, channel availability, range, and client support.
Choose MTU and jumbo-frame settings end to end while accounting for encapsulation and path consistency.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
